initial_prompt:
At {workdir} is a Python 3.13 project with an app.py that uses a match
statement. `ruff check app.py` fails with a SyntaxError claiming match
statements were added in Python 3.10. The code is valid on 3.13. The ruff
binary on PATH is the pinned old version shipped in fixture/files/vendor.
Diagnose why ruff rejects valid 3.13 code and apply the correct fix — do
not delete the match statement, and do not add `# noqa`.
